overall_judgment: Feasible only as a constitutional and commercial redesign. Not feasible as a thin policy overlay on the current repository.

0_to_3_months.scope: Doctrine, governance, economics, and release-architecture rewrite

3_to_12_months.scope: Product membrane redesign, runtime gating, and enterprise licensing model

12_to_36_months.scope: Native model sovereignty, internal-only novelty operations, and mature refusal architecture

components_requiring_major_rewrite: C14 governance participation and release authority
C15 task marketplace and provider economics
C18 open-source and IP publication posture

top_risks.risk: Institutional opacity replaces external misuse with internal misuse
top_risks.mitigation: Adopt open accountability, external audit surfaces, and constitutional review mechanisms

top_risks.risk: Revenue collapse after abandoning the marketplace thesis
top_risks.mitigation: Define bounded consumer, enterprise, and licensing products before retiring marketplace assumptions

top_risks.risk: Founder-alignment language collides with the existing non-dynasty constitution
top_risks.mitigation: Separate founder reward mechanisms from governance authority
Use frontier models as bootstrap cognition leases while building native control planes and trace corpora first
Create formal release classes, strategic-retention review, and red-team review instead of relying on broad moral language

bottom_line: Ashur recommends proceeding only if Atrahasis is willing to redesign governance, economics, publication posture, and commercialization together.
